product.title: Estée Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Foundation Makeup | Long-Wear Matte Foundation, 1 Fl Oz

primaryFeatures.color: 2N1 Desert Beige - Light-medium with neutral undertones

featureBullets: ORIGINAL FORMULA: Available while supplies last. Discover the new flawless with NEW Double Wear
ALL-DAY STAYING POWER: 24-hour wear. Sweat-, heat- and humidity-resistant. Lifeproof, waterproof foundation. Oil-free. Controls oil all day. 24-hour color true. Plus, it strengthens skin's barrier
FRESH, MATTE FINISH: Buildable medium-to-full coverage foundation. Feels lightweight and so comfortable, you won't believe it's long wear
OVER 55 SHADES: A wide range of shades that flatters all. Unifies uneven skintone and covers imperfections. Won't look grey on deeper skintones

DERMATOLOGIST-TESTED: Oil-free, non-acnegenic. Won’t clog pores or cause breakouts. Ideal for normal to oily skin. Free of synthetic fragrances, gluten, parabens, phthalates, sulfites, drying alcohols, mineral oil-and animal-derived ingredients

specification.value: 2N1 Desert Beige - Light-medium with neutral undertones
Medium-to-full, buildable coverage foundation. Fresh, matte finish. Controls oil all day. Sweat-, heat- & humidity-resistant.
#723 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #10 in Foundation Makeup
Hydration, Long Lasting, UV Protection, Waterproof
Gluten Free, Oil Free, Paraben Free, Synthetic Fragrance Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be of great quality, with flawless coverage that stays all day and matches their skin well. The product keeps oily skin under control and provides a natural matte finish that doesn't look caked on. While some customers say it's very kind to their skin, others find it feels dry. Customers consider the price worth it.

reviews.reviewText: Long-lasting matte foundations (approx. 24h) Estée Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place 🔹 Ultra-resistant, medium-to-high coverage, controls shine all day. Ideal for combination to oily skin. Maybelline Super Stay 24H/30H 🔹 Very good staying power, natural matte finish, and affordable price. Works very well for long daily wear. L’Oréal Infallible 24H Fresh Wear (Matte) 🔹 Lightweight yet long-lasting, doesn't cake, and keeps the face fresh for many hours. Huda Beauty #FauxFilter Matte 🔹 High coverage, flawless skin effect, and excellent resistance to heat and humidity. MAC Studio Fix Fluid 🔹 Classic matte, controls oil, and lasts all day without feeling heavy. 💄 Tips for longer-lasting makeup Use a mattifying primer before your foundation Apply with a brush or damp sponge Set with translucent powder on your T-zone Finish with long-lasting setting spray If you'd like, tell me: 👉 your skin type (oily, combination, dry) 👉 whether you prefer light, medium, or full coverage 👉 or if you're looking for something affordable or luxurious and I'll recommend the perfect option for you ✨
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 15, 2025

productSpecs.color: 2W2 Rattan - Light-medium with warm olive undertones

reviews.reviewText: The best foundation! Very full coverage but still light weight! Pretty crease resistant and easy to apply.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026

productSpecs.color: 1C1 Cool Bone - Light with cool rosy-peach undertones

reviews.reviewTitle: THE GREATEST LIQUID FOUNDATION ON EARTH
reviews.reviewText: This foundation is AMAZING! I know this because the few times I sleep with my makeup on, when I wake up the next day, my makeup looks amazing lije I just put it on! It never rubs off on my clothes or pillows, and if you scratch your face it doesn't come off. This stuff is amazing. It's better than every single bottle of drug store makeup I've ever bought in the last 27 years, hands down, no exceptions. This makeup IS THE BEST. It's worth every single dollar! Ladies, I'm telling you- buy this and you will not be disappointed! Cool colors mean they have a yellow tint Warm colors mean they have a pink tint. Neutral colors have a bit of both yellow and pink.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is one of my favorite foundations--the coverage is full but it feels light! It smooths the texture of my skin and goes on flawlessly.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026

productSpecs.color: 2N1 Desert Beige - Light-medium with neutral undertones

reviews.reviewText: The best foundation. The coverage is great and it stays on forever! You don’t need much, start small. I always get compliments when I wear it. It feels lightweight and blends good. I wish it came with a pump for easier application.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage but sometimes can be a little heavy. You have to be careful with how much you apply or you end up looking a little cakey. But other than that, totally recommend for the coverage and how long it lasts. A little expensive but a little goes a long way.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 8, 2025

productSpecs.color: 3C1 Dusk - Medium with cool rosy-peach undertones

reviews.reviewText: This foundation is my all-time favorite because it’s long-lasting, double-wear, and blends into my skin tone perfectly. It gives a beautiful look when I use it, and it’s not too heavy or dry. If you moisturize first and blend well with a sponge blender, it should leave you with a gorgeous finish.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 2, 2026

productSpecs.color: 2W2 Rattan - Light-medium with warm olive undertones

reviews.reviewTitle: Been Using This for Years – Still My Go-To Foundation!
reviews.reviewText: I have been using the Estée Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Matte Foundation for years, and I am over 40, so that says a lot. Yes, it is a liquid makeup, but I absolutely love how it looks on my skin. I don’t use a lot at once, just a light layer applied with a sponge, and it blends beautifully for a natural, flawless finish. The foundation lasts all day, which is amazing because I don’t have to worry about touch-ups, even with my normal face oils. The color I chose is a bit lighter than my natural tone, but it gradually blends and warms up during the day with my skin’s natural oils, which is completely normal and actually looks very natural. I love that it makes my skin look smooth, even, and radiant without feeling heavy. This foundation has remained a staple in my routine because it gives me confidence that my skin looks great from morning to night. I highly recommend it for anyone looking for long-lasting, natural-looking coverage.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 30, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Thank you so much for the fast delivery of the product. Just in time to use it for work. I tried it and it looks great and a match to my skin color.
